title: Good: GradientTable uses OrderedDict for efficient LRU eviction
description:
src/lichen/gradient.py:75 uses OrderedDict for the gradient table:
- O(1) lookup, insert, delete
- O(1) move_to_end for LRU updates
- Built-in LRU eviction via popitem(last=False)
- Bounded capacity (MAX_ENTRIES=64)

This is the right data structure for the job - no external dependency needed for LRU cache semantics.
